error_signature: end date needs to be 11 November to include data up to 10 November
title: Date range filter requires end date adjustment
symptom: When filtering data with a date range, setting the end date to 10 November does not return expected results. Users must set it to 11 November to include all data for the 10th.
not_this_if: End date is set to 11 November or later
root_cause: The date filter interprets the end date as the start of the specified day. To include the entire day of the end date, it must be set to the start of the next day or the last minute of the specified day.
fix_steps: Change the end date to 11 November
Alternatively, set the end time to 23:59 on 10 November
agent_instruction: Adjust the end date to 11 November or set the time to 23:59 on 10 November.
